package_metadata.title: Scope University Prerequisite Override Authority
package_metadata.license: CC-BY-4.0 for benchmark adaptation; original source remains under its own terms.

provenance.source_organization: University of Texas at San Antonio
provenance.adaptation_method: Paraphrased and condensed into a synthetic scenario while preserving the relation pattern needed for benchmark evaluation. The case is not a substitute for the source document.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Evaluation artifact only; do not use as legal, tax, clinical, cloud operations, immigration, or institutional policy advice.

source_excerpts.text:
University prerequisite override note.

Section A. Prerequisite restriction. A student who has not satisfied a course prerequisite cannot register unless an override is approved.

Section B. Approval authority. Prerequisite override requests are reviewed by the course instructor and/or the department chair. Academic advisors and the registrar's office cannot approve prerequisite override requests.

University prerequisite override note.

<rule id="R1">Section A. Prerequisite restriction. A student who has not satisfied a course prerequisite cannot register unless an override is approved.</rule>

<scope id="S1" applies_to="R1" authority="instructor_or_department_chair_only">Section B. Approval authority. Prerequisite override requests are reviewed by the course instructor and/or the department chair. Academic advisors and the registrar's office cannot approve prerequisite override requests.</scope>

compiled_representation.content:
rules:
  - id: R1
    condition: prerequisite_not_satisfied
    enrollment_allowed_only_if: prerequisite_override_approved
scope_constraints:
  - id: S1
    valid_approvers: [course_instructor, department_chair]
    invalid_approvers: [academic_advisor, registrar_office]

rules.description: Adapted from a university prerequisite override page. Level-1 scope: advisors/registrar are outside approval authority for prerequisite overrides.

decision_rules.query: A student lacks a prerequisite. Their academic advisor says the override is approved, but neither the instructor nor the department chair has reviewed it. Under this note, is the prerequisite override approved?
decision_rules.expected_decision: No. Advisor approval is outside the valid approval authority.
decision_rules.rationale: No. The student needs an approved override, but approval authority is scoped to the course instructor and/or department chair. An academic advisor cannot approve the prerequisite override.

qa_pairs.question: A student lacks a prerequisite. Their academic advisor says the override is approved, but neither the instructor nor the department chair has reviewed it. Under this note, is the prerequisite override approved?
qa_pairs.answer: No. The student needs an approved override, but approval authority is scoped to the course instructor and/or department chair. An academic advisor cannot approve the prerequisite override.
The course instructor and/or department chair, not academic advisors or the registrar.

composition_hallucination: Yes, because the advisor works in academic advising and approved it.
No override is ever possible when prerequisites are missing.
wrong_escalation: Require the university president to approve the course registration.
failure_modes.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragment is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: A student lacks a prerequisite and the department chair approves the override. Is the approval-authority scope satisfied?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes. The department chair is within the valid approval authority described in the note.
